title: Kaolack Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kaolack, with a Z-Score of +6.06. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current conditions in Kaolack are extremely hot, with a CDD of 20.2 GG and very low humidity at 22%. 
 The heat wave is expected to persist, causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 10.3 km/h, but this will not provide much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
